description.value: The [[lookup @name]]'s ranged free strikes have a distance of 12.
Each enemy within 2 squares of the [[lookup @name]] can't hide or be hidden.
This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason.
This creature may choose to deal sonic damage on their free strikes.

biography.value: These massive clods of animated stone roll upon smaller piles of rocks that could be perceived as limbs. Walking boulders are useful for taking up space and forming barricades.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]] obstructs line of effect for enemies.
When one or more [[lookup @name]]s is reduced to 0 Stamina, they each leave behind a stone wall equal to their size in their space until the end of the encounter.
The [[lookup @name]] has stability equal to your reason.

biography.value: These brawny sprites wear heavy beetle armor and have a halo hovering away from their backs where their wings used to be. The faster the halo spins, the more power the olyender generates, enabling them to stand toe to toe with giants.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]]'s melee strikes inflict push 4. If the target is force moved into an object, they are [[op M average]] [[/apply prone]]{knocked prone} and can't stand (save ends).
This creature has Stability equal to your reason.
When targeting a creature with a grab or forced movement, the [[lookup @name]]'s size is considered one larger than the target.
The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.

biography.value: A false vampire is a bestial, bipedal ghoul that draws life from liquified remains. In death, their hands curl into thick hooks, their bodies turn a putrid red-green as if wearing a dress suit, and their mouth twists and extends into a large feeding needle that can pierce steel.

items.name: Corruption and Poison Immunity and AcidFree Strike

description.value: This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason. They can choose to deal acid damage on their free strikes.

The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes have a distance of 2 and inflict [[op M average]] [[/apply restrained turn]]. The [[lookup @name]] can move the target while they are restrained this way. At the start of a restrained creature's turn, they take acid damage equal to your Reason.
The [[lookup @name]] has a speed of 10 while a creature is bleeding within 10.

biography.value: A spewler's mouth makes up most of its size. They unleash torrents of acid and bile from their pitless stomachs before consuming their prey with bag-like maws.

description.value: You can choose for this creature's free strikes to deal acid damage.
The [[lookup @name]]'s ranged free strikes have a distance of 10 and slides the target (your R) + 2 squares.

Each time the [[lookup @name]] takes damage, the [[lookup @name]] shifts 2 after all effects resolve. Each square they exit during this movement is covered in slime until the end of the encounter. An enemy has a bane on strikes while occupying a slimed square.
Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

biography.value: This vaguely humanoid form is warped and distorted by a demon nestled inside them. They extend long tongues from multiple orifices to drag victims in close.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes have a distance of 3 and inflict pull 1. The pull distance increases by 1 for each additional [[lookup @name]] striking the same target. Choose the [[lookup @name]] that the target is being pulled to before applying forced movement.
Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

biography.value: The silks are akin to baby spiders ballooning through the air on strands of webbing. They spin silk from their legs as they fly, eventually turning huge swaths of the environment into tangled web mazes.

description.value: This creature has poison immunity equal to your Reason.
The [[lookup @name]]'s ranged free strikes inflict [[op A average]] [[/apply restrained turn]]. Each creature adjacent to the target is [[op A weak]] [[/apply slowed turn]].

When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, they launch ribbons of webbing into an area equal to their size + 1 within 5 before being destroyed. The affected area is considered difficult terrain for enemies until the end of the encounter. An enemy that ends their turn in the webbing is [[op M strong]] [[/apply slowed turn]].

biography.value: This pixie flies on a delicate array of vibrant flower petals for wings. The color drains from their wings as they call forth acid rain showers.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]] has Acid immunity equal to your Reason. You can choose for their free strike damage type to be Acid.
The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

effect.after: After the [[lookup @name]]'s squad uses this ability, you or one ally within distance can spend a Recovery or end a condition.

biography.value: Dandeknights are sprite warriors whose dragonfly wingbeats emit a tonal drone. They're usually clad in tassels that shift color as they swing their weapons.

description.value: When the [[lookup @name]] strikes, you can choose one of the following damage types: acid, cold, corruption, fire, lightning, poison, or sonic. The strike deals that damage.
When the [[lookup @name]] makes a free strike, they can make two free strikes instead. The damage is added together and treated as a single strike if both strikes hit the same target.
The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.

biography.value: Shades are a form of umbral stalker that float free from any floor or surface. They can bend their appearance to completely vanish in the light.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]] turns invisible, shifts 3 squares, and reappears after making a strike.

The [[lookup @name]] can move through other creatures and objects at normal speed. The first time in a round that the [[lookup @name]] passes through a creature, that creature takes [[/damage 2 corruption]]. The [[lookup @name]] doesn't take damage from being force moved into objects.
This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason.

biography.value: This elemental is a pure-white vulpine with six legs that freely sprints through the air. Their howls are telepathic, washing over the receivers with a strong chill and a wave of goosebumps.

description.value: When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, they launch a refreshing blast of air into an area equal to their size + 1 within 5 before being destroyed. Each ally in the affected area [[/gain 1 surge]]{gains a surge}.

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

effect.after: Frost slows the enemy down, allowing one ally adjacent to each target to shift 2 and either hide or defend.

biography.value: These autonomous bone networks fall just short of replicating the structure they had in life. Skeleton bones are especially brittle and can splinter into huge shards when met with enough force.

description.value: When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, their square becomes difficult terrain for enemies. The first time any enemy enters this space, they take [[/damage 2]] and end this effect.
This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason.

biography.value: Loftlillies lazily drift through the air in flower cups. They sip on toxic nectar to emit a powerful haze from their skin.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.
The [[lookup @name]] has Poison immunity equal to your Reason. You can choose for their free strike damage type to be Poison.

The area within 1 square of the [[lookup @name]] causes each enemy and object with a size equal to your Reason or smaller to float 1 square off the ground until they leave the area. A floating enemy that can't fly is unable to shift, moves 2 additional squares from forced movement, and has a bane on strikes.

biography.value: A fire plume burns so bright that their true shape is hard to discern from the flames. They sputter and spit motes of fire in high arcs.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]]'s ranged free strikes have a distance of 10.
This creature has fire immunity equal to your Reason and can choose to do fire damage for their free strikes.

When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, their space becomes wreathed in flames until the end of the encounter. An enemy that enters this space or starts their turn there takes [[/damage 2 fire]].

biography.value: This elemental is a long, serpentine creature of heated rock. Flows of magma drool trails of lava from their fangs after biting their prey.

description.value: This creature has fire immunity equal to your Reason and can choose to do fire damage for their free strikes.

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

effect.after: Each square that the [[lookup @name]] shifts into becomes wreathed in flames until the start of the [[lookup @name]]'s next turn. An enemy that enters an affected square takes 2 damage.

description.value: When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, they launch lava into an area equal to 1 + their size within 5 squares. The affected area becomes difficult terrain for enemies until the end of the encounter. An enemy that enters an affected square or starts their turn there takes [[potency A average]] [[/damage 4 fire]].

biography.value: The grave knights are zombie warriors that continue to fight after death. Any blood spilled at a grave knight's hand runs pitch black.

description.value: This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason.
When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, they can make a melee free strike before being destroyed.

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

description.value: The [[lookup @name]] has Fire immunity equal to your Reason. You can choose for their free strike damage type to be Fire .
The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.
The foxglow's melee strikes inflict [[op I strong]] [[/apply dazed turn]] if they were hidden when they make the strike.
The area within 2 squares of the foxglow is completely silent. Each enemy has a bane on tests made to search for the foxglow and allies hidden in the affected area.

biography.value: Husks have stiff corpses that snap and crackle with each sudden movement. Corrosive breath endlessly billows from their slackjawed faces.

items.name: Corruption and Poison Immunity and Corruption Free Strike

description.value: This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason. They may choose to deal corruption damage on their free strikes.
The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes inflict [[potency M weak]] [[/apply slowed turn]]. The potency increases by 1 for each additional husk adjacent to the target (maximum +2).

biography.value: The boil arises from the chaotic depths of the Abyssal Waste, concentrated into a heaving mass by the pressure of a coherent reality. As it slushes and threatens to burst, the noises drive nearby demons into a frenzy.

description.value: Each enemy that starts their turn within 3 squares of [[lookup @name]] is [[op I average]] [[/apply taunted turn]] by [[lookup @name]], or [[op I weak]] [[/apply taunted turn]] by the boil and can't move further from it.
When [[lookup @name]] is destroyed, each enemy within 3 squares of [[lookup @name]] takes acid damage equal to your level and is [[op A strong]] [[/apply weakened save]].

biography.value: Ensnarers knot and twist their bodies together to form heaving, heavy musilexes. They're compelled to drag everything in toward their body.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes have a distance of 2 + (your R) and inflict pull 2. The pull distance increases by 2 for each additional [[lookup @name]] striking the same target. Choose the [[lookup @name]] that the target is being pulled to before applying forced movement. If the target is pulled adjacent to the [[lookup @name]], the [[lookup @name]] either deals an additional [[/damage 2]] or [[/apply grabbed]]{grabs them}.
Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

biography.value: The orchiguard is a sprite surrounded by a wheel of shields. They are usually crushed by the pressures of their own impenetrable defenses before ever being felled by enemy hands.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.

Each non-[[lookup @name]] ally takes half damage from abilities while within 1 square of the [[lookup @name]]. Whenever the [[lookup @name]] reduces damage this way, they take damage equal to half their maximum Stamina and their free strike damage increases by 1.

biography.value: Corallias are saltwater nixies with coarse, coral-like skin and curly hair with hooked ends. Their salty tears are used to hallow places of worship and ward off demons.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]] has Lightning immunity equal to your Reason.

Once per turn during their move action, each [[lookup @name]] under your control can teleport to a body of water within 6. The [[lookup @name]] can't teleport into water created by their own seafoam pool.

The area within 2 squares of the [[lookup @name]] is filled with purifying saltwater that disables the effects of difficult terrain created by enemies. At the end of the [[lookup @name]]'s turn, the [[lookup @name]] can scrub you or an ally in the affected area and end one condition.
The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.
Each enemy that starts their turn within 3 squares of the [[lookup @name]] is [[op I average]] [[/apply frightened turn]] by the [[lookup @name]]. The potency increases by 1 for winded enemies.
Each of your undead minions has damage immunity 2 while occupying a space within 3 squares of the [[lookup @name]].

biography.value:
Your champion is an Attendant of a celestial. Whenever you call on their assistance, you must formally welcome and introduce them to the occasion. You can't be certain if this is truly the blessing of a celestial you've previously allied yourself with, or if you've received someone else's power—neither circumstance puts you in any less danger.

The celestial Attendant wants to swarm the map with pixies while limiting their foes' ability to do anything about it. A single neurotoxic strike is all it takes to move everyone into position.

description.value: This creature's maximum stamina is equal to your maximum stamina.
If the [[lookup @name]] only targets one creature or object with a strike, they deal additional damage to the target equal to your Reason.
You can choose for this creature's free strike damage type to be Poison.
A creature that takes damage from the [[lookup @name]]'s free strike is [[op I average]] unable to establish line of effect beyond 3 squares (EoT).
The [[lookup @name]] starts their turn with temporary Stamina equal to 2 x the number of fey minions within 1 square of them. This temporary Stamina lasts until the start of their next turn.

effect.after: An ally targeted by this ability can, instead, spend Recovery and shift the slide amount.

system.trigger: The Attendant takes damage from an enemy.

effect.before: The [[lookup @name]] rings a bell, and you summon a signature minion into an unoccupied space adjacent to the Attendant.

description.value: You can choose for the [[lookup @name]]'s damage to be Lightning.

Once per turn during their move action, each [[lookup @name]] under your control can teleport to a body of water within 6. The [[lookup @name]] can't teleport into water created by their own whirling waves.

The area within 1 square of the [[lookup @name]] is filled with churning water and if considered difficult terrain. At the end of the [[lookup @name]]'s turn, the [[lookup @name]] can choose to slide each enemy in the affected area 3 squares. An enemy that takes damage while being force moved with [[op M average]] is [[/apply prone]].
The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.

biography.value: Phase ghouls are bilocated undead caught between two different manifolds, rapidly flickering between them. They almost appear transparent save for their long, bright blue tongues that appears to lag behind their movements by a full second.

description.value: This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason.
The [[lookup @name]] teleports 5 squares before making a melee free strike. The target is [[op M average]] [[/apply prone]]{knocked prone}. If the target is in the air, the potency increases by 1.
The [[lookup @name]] takes no damage from falling and always lands on their feet.

biography.value: Zombie titan is a catchall for undead giants, patchwork ogres and mournlings, or amalgamations of a graveyard's entire population. The titan lumbers and slumps across battlefields, wanting desperately to collapse and crash into the earth like a sea of flesh and bone.

description.value: This creature has Stability equal to your reason.
This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason.
The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes [[op M strong]] [[/apply prone]]{knock the target prone}.
The [[lookup @name]] can move through enemies at normal speed. If the [[lookup @name]] ends their turn in a prone size 2 or smaller creature's space, the creature can't stand.

When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, their space becomes difficult terrain. If a creature was prone underneath the titan when the titan is killed, they take [[/damage 10]] and are [[/apply restrained save]].

biography.value: The crux is a curtain of billowing hot ash with an avian head. They cover their victims in a burning cloak of charcoal and soot.

description.value: This creature has fire and sonic immunity equal to your reason.

The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes [[potency M average]] automatically hide each ally from the target until the start of the crux's next turn, until the target uses a maneuver to clear the soot, until the crux takes damage, or until the crux is destroyed.

When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, the area within 1 square of the [[lookup @name]] is clouded by ash until it is dispersed by wind. You or any ally are concealed while occupying an affected square. An enemy can't establish line of effect beyond the ash while occupying an affected square.

biography.value: These nixies are especially tiny. Their hair grows longer than their bodies and curls into reeds. The water soakreeds swim in tends to turn thick and cling to surfaces.

description.value: Once per turn during their move action, each [[lookup @name]] under your control can teleport to a body of water within 5. The [[lookup @name]] can't teleport into water created by their own soaking bog.

The area within 1 square of the [[lookup @name]] is filled with swampy water. An enemy that starts their turn in the area with A < (your A - 2) is [[/apply slowed turn]]. The potency increases by 1 for each additional soaking bog the target occupies (maximum +2).
The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.

biography.value: Razors appear to be a diminutive variant of the ruinant demon. Their bodies are swift, tumbling mounds of scarred flesh and deadly claws.

description.value: Once per turn, whenever an adjacent enemy grabs the [[lookup @name]] or uses a melee ability against them, that enemy takes 1 damage for each [[lookup @name]] adjacent to them.
Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

biography.value: The rasquine are skulking demons that shimmer in the light. They teleport into position before biting the necks of their prey.

description.value: Once per turn, the [[lookup @name]] can hide as a free maneuver after teleporting.
Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

biography.value: The preserved dead, bound for eternal rest, know only violence when robbed of their future. Accursed mummies use their wrappings to bind others to the same fate.

description.value: Whenever the [[lookup @name]] takes damage, each enemy adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] takes [[/damage 2 poison]].

items.name: Corruption and Poison Immunity and Poison Free Strike

description.value: This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason. They can choose to deal poison damage on their free strikes.

effect.before: The range of this ability is equal to your reason.
effect.after: A target pulled adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] is [[op M strong]] [[/apply weakened turn]].

biography.value: Iron reavers are long, gnashing lines of centipede-like bladed legs. Their bodies endlessly shed metal shavings and hard sheets of iron as they move.

description.value: This creature has Stability equal to your reason.
This creature has poison immunity equal to your Reason.

The [[lookup @name]] has cover while adjacent to another [[lookup @name]] they were summoned with. Whenever they receive an effect that allows them to move or shift outside of their move action, they share the effect with each adjacent [[lookup @name]] they were summoned with.

The [[lookup @name]]'s free strikes inflict [[op M weak]] [[/apply bleeding save]]. Each time the [[lookup @name]] inflicts bleeding on a creature, they can shift 2 and make an additional free strike on a new target.

When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, they create a line equal to 2 x their size centered on their space of iron shards on the ground until the end of the encounter. You or any ally has cover and damage immunity 2 while occupying an affected square.

biography.value: The gales are twisting ribbons of cloud and debris endlessly dancing in place. They disrupt the air and allow their allies to move freely.

description.value: This creature has sonic immunity equal to your Reason and can choose to do sonic damage for their free strikes.
The [[lookup @name]] doesn't provoke opportunity attacks by moving.

When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, winds whip in their space until the end of the encounter. You or an ally that enters this space or starts their turn there can immediately shift (including vertically).

biography.value:
Your champion is an Aspect of a demon lord. They have borne witness to your exploits and struck a deal with you: Allow their children to feed and you can call forth a modicum of their power. Morality is none of their concern, but certainly a hero is enough of an arbiter of whose souls deserve to be fed to demons, right?

The demon lord's Aspect enjoys bringing enemies in close with their appendages or flinging victims and throwing them to the gnashing horde. They're willing to put your connection to this world at risk if it means taking one more bite.

description.value: This creature's maximum stamina is equal to your maximum stamina.
The [[lookup @name]]'s free strikes teleport the target 5 squares.
If the [[lookup @name]] only targets one creature or object with a strike, they deal additional damage to the target equal to your Reason.
When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, they make a free strike against each adjacent enemy before dying.

system.trigger: The aspect takes damage from an enemy.

effect.before: The [[lookup @name]] has a double edge on their next power roll. They can choose to give this benefit to an ally within your Summoner's Range instead.

description.value: This creature can choose to deal corruption damage on their free strikes.

biography.value: The bengrul is an undulating heap of glass and flesh. They shatter pieces of themselves to disrupt senses and inflict grisly wounds on their prey.

description.value: Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.
You can choose for this creature's free strikes to deal psychic damage.

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

effect.after: A twisted target can't take advantage of edges or search for hidden creatures until the condition ends.

effects.name: Twisted
effects.description: A twisted target can't take advantage of edges or search for hidden creatures until the condition ends.

biography.value: These phantoms puppet the remnants of their corporeal forms. Unlike other spirits, the ripper tears the reality around them and leaves behind distorted or uneven “bumps” in the air, which can affect stone, metal, and flesh.

description.value: This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason.

The [[lookup @name]] can move through other creatures and objects at normal speed. The first time in a round that the [[lookup @name]] passes through a creature, that creature takes [[/damage 3 corruption]] and has a bane on their next strike. The [[lookup @name]] doesn't take damage from being force moved into objects.

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

effect.after: The [[lookup @name]] deals an additional [[/damage 3]] if they have an edge.

description.value: Each enemy that starts their turn within 3 squares of the crystal is vertically pulled 3.
When you or an ally uses a ranged ability that draws a line through the crystal, the distance increases by 5.

biography.value: The desolations have vaguely humanoid sand forms with no legs. Their glass hose “arms” shift and bristle before firing high pressure streams of sand at their foes.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]]'s free strikes inflict [[potency M average]] [[/apply slowed save]]. If the target is already slowed, then they are [[potency M strong]] [[/apply restrained end]].
This creature has sonic immunity equal to your Reason.
The [[lookup @name]] doesn't provoke opportunity attacks by moving.

When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, the area within 1 square of the [[lookup @name]] becomes difficult terrain for enemies until the end of the encounter. You or an ally that enters the affected area can immediately shift 3.

biography.value: These faceless suits of armor have visible rivers of deep red blood flowing throughout their being. Their blood has a powerful pull to it, causing any open wounds nearby to rip deeper and leak toward the knight.

description.value: This creature has corruption immunity equal to your Reason. You may choose for their free strikes to deal corruption damage.
This creature has Stability equal to your reason.
The [[lookup @name]]'s melee strikes inflict [[op P strong]] [[/apply bleeding save]]. While bleeding this way, the target can't roll lower than a 3 on the die used to resolve bleeding damage.

When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, they move up to their speed ignoring opportunity attacks. Each square that they exit during this movement pools with blood until the end of the encounter. Each affected square is considered difficult terrain for enemies and deals [[/damage 3 corruption]] to an enemy when they first enter it on a turn. Whenever a bleeding enemy starts their turn within 10 squares of the blood pool, they are pulled 2 toward the nearest affected square, ignoring stability.

biography.value:
Your champion is an Avatar of death. The number of creatures you and your army have laid to rest now hangs above your head and threatens to crush your skull at any moment. You were unable to gain the power of the ultimate force of nature without a memento mori to keep you humble.

The Avatar of death weighs down their foes with conditions so their army can take care of the rest. If an enemy can't handle it, well then maybe they should just die.

description.value: If the [[lookup @name]] only targets one creature or object with a strike, they deal additional damage to the target equal to your Reason.
This creature's maximum stamina is equal to your maximum stamina.

items.name: Corruption and Poison Immunity + Holy Free Strike

description.value: This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason. You can choose for their free strikes to deal holy damage.
The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes [[op P weak]] instantly reduce a winded non-leader or solo creature to 0 Stamina, including targets winded by the strike.
The [[lookup @name]] is unaffected by difficult terrain and damage from forced movement.

effect.after: If the target is a creature that isn't a leader or a solo and they are still bleeding at the end of the encounter, they instantly die.

biography.value: These minor demons resemble larger pitlings. They can spit a nerve-numbing phlegm at long distance that makes it easy to catch their next meal.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]]'s ranged free strikes have a distance of 10 and deal 2 poison damage to an enemy adjacent to the target. Creatures that take poison damage from this [[lookup @name]] can't shift until the start of the [[lookup @name]]'s next turn.
You can choose for this creature's free strikes to deal poison damage.
Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

biography.value: The manes of these equine sludge dwellers extend and hook into things like strong, fraying arms. This allows the principle of the swamp to either pull themselves onto dry land, or pull their prey into the dank depths.

description.value: This creature has Stability equal to your reason.
This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason.

The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes have a distance of your Reason and inflict [[op M strong]] [[//apply grabbed]]. The [[lookup @name]] can have an unlimited number of creatures or objects grabbed. A creature grabbed by this strike still has their normal speed, but can't move farther away from the principle.

When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, the area within 1 square of the [[lookup @name]] becomes difficult terrain for enemies until the end of the encounter. An enemy that ends their turn in the affected area is pulled 4 toward the center of the area.

biography.value: These elementals are blazing white avian-shaped beings that are nearly impossible to perceive directly. Between a light of the sun's talons is a massive glowing sword that can split the heaviest of defenses asunder.

items.name: Corruption and Fire Immunity and Fire Free Strikes

description.value: This creature has corruption and fire immunity equal to your Reason. You may choose for their free strikes to deal fire damage.

When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, the area within 1 square of the [[lookup @name]] becomes wreathed in sentient flames until the end of the encounter. An enemy that enters this area or starts their turn there takes [[/damage 3 fire]] and is [[/apply slowed turn]]. You or any ally that enters this area or starts their turn there [[/heal 5 temporary]]{gains 5 temporary Stamina} and their speed increases by 2 until the end of their turn.

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

effect.after: A target dazed by this ability has their stability reduced to 0 until the condition ends.

description.value: When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, each enemy adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] has a bane on their next strike.

Once per turn, the [[lookup @name]] can transform into an adjacent allied signature minion, maintaining their current Stamina. The minion must be reassigned to a new squad if their new name differs from the other squad members.

Alternatively, you can spend 1 essence to transform the [[lookup @name]] into any signature minion in the elemental portfolio you don't have, as if you summoned the new minion into the [[lookup @name]]'s space.

biography.value: The gorrre demons evoke features of rhino and orangutan while clad in heavy armor. They've been utilized as jail guards by devils, as few prisoners can ever hope to outrun a monster with unlimited endurance.

description.value: Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

The [[lookup @name]] must charge before making a strike. The target is [[op M strong]] [[/apply prone]]{knocked prone} if the [[lookup @name]] moved through an enemy or object other than the target during the charge.
The [[lookup @name]] ignores difficult terrain while charging and destroys unattended, size 1 objects in their path. Each enemy they move through during a charge takes [[/damage 3]].

biography.value: The violents are lanky, oily bipeds with bright red flesh that contort and snap their bodies into unassuming objects. Their mimicry is particularly precise, to the point where it's unclear whether their victims die from the surprise or the violent transformation process first.

description.value: You can choose for this creature's free strikes to deal corruption damage.
The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes deal an additional [[/damage 2]] to each adjacent enemy from whom they were hidden. The [[lookup @name]] loses their disguise after striking.
The [[lookup @name]] uses the Hide maneuver at the start of their turn as a free maneuver, disguising themselves as a a size 1M or smaller object.
Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

biography.value: This cherubin creature is bloated and warped by demonic energy. The lights from their myriad eyes have all but gone out, now resembling pustules across their body.

description.value: You can choose for this creature's free strikes to deal corruption damage.
The [[lookup @name]] must land on the ground at the end of their turn or fall prone.
Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

effect.after: Instead of taking damage, you or an ally targeted by this ability impose a double bane on the next strike that targets them.

biography.value: These massive, animated ogre corpses still maintain their incredible grip strength. When a lumberer falls, they'll take anything within reach down with them.

description.value: This creature has Stability equal to your reason.

The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes inflict [[op A average]] [[/apply grabbed]]. A creature or object that starts their turn grabbed by the [[lookup @name]] takes corruption damage equal to your Reason.
When the [[lookup @name]] is reduced to 0 Stamina, they can latch onto an adjacent enemy before being destroyed. The enemy is [[op M strong]] [[/apply restrained turn]].
This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason.

biography.value: It's difficult to identify the base nature of a vicisittante apart from an ever-changing mass of burning flesh. Any surface they touch immediately scars as the demon leaves parts of themselves behind.

description.value: You can choose for this creature's free strikes to deal psychic damage.
Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

effect.after: A target weakened by this ability is always considered flanked by the [[lookup @name]] regardless of position until the condition ends.

biography.value: Chimors have no true shape; their bodies restructure and change endlessly. Pieces of the chimor demon snap off inside their prey, causing their bodies to also restructure from the inside out.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]]'s melee free strikes inflict [[op M weak]] [[/apply weakened turn]]. The potency is increased by the current round number.
The [[lookup @name]] doesn't provoke opportunity attacks by moving.
Each creature adjacent to the [[lookup @name]] can't be hidden from them.

biography.value: The belladonix are found among the elite guard of fey monarchs and carry themselves like royalty. Their moth-like wings ooze with vibrant colors and are barbed; the poison within threatening to completely shift the reality of their victims.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.
The [[lookup @name]] has Poison immunity equal to your Reason. You can choose for their free strike damage type to be Poison.

items.name: A Thorn, Woe to the Pricked

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

effect.after: A target restrained by this ability is trapped in a poison-fueled haze and considers each creature within 1 square of them to be an enemy until the condition ends.

biography.value: The bellringers are glowing pixies that jingle as they fly. Historically, these pixies worked alongside bowman to ensure their arrows struck true.

description.value: The [[lookup @name]]'s free strikes grant an edge to the next strike made against the target, or a double edge if two or more [[lookup @name]]s strike the same target.
Each ally within 1 square of a [[lookup @name]] has a +1 to saving throws. Each enemy within 1 square of a [[lookup @name]] has a −1 to saving throws.
The [[lookup @name]] has cover while occupying a larger creature's space.

The [[lookup @name]] can move through spaces as if they were size 1T, and can occupy other creatures' spaces. At the start of the [[lookup @name]]'s turn, they deal 2 damage to each enemy whose space they share.

target.custom: One creature or object per minion

effect.after: A target can't shift while bleeding from this ability.

biography.value: Mournlings are hulking amalgams of mismatched cadavers with tear- stained trenches where their cheeks used to be. Their crying shakes enemies to their bone and renders them struggling to move.

description.value: This creature has corruption immunity and poison immunity equal to your Reason.
This creature may choose to deal sonic damage on their free strikes.
This creature has Stability equal to your reason.
At the end of the [[lookup @name]]'s turn, each enemy within 1 of the [[lookup @name]] takes [[/damage 2 sonix]] and can't shift until the start of the [[lookup @name]]'s next turn.
The [[lookup @name]]'s shape can't change via any external effects.
The first time the [[lookup @name]] burrows out of the ground on their turn, they can make a free strike against each adjacent enemy.

biography.value:
Your champion is a Portent of a dragon yet to manifest. Through defending the innocent, you have made yourself and your elementals a close neighbor to the malice that threatens them. The dragon desires you bring their creation about and lends you strength to see your justice through.

As a harbinger of ruin, the dragon's Portent has incredibly potent impact and control of the environment. Their final shape has yet to be determined; use this to your advantage and call upon the affinity that will end conflict the quickest.

description.value: This creature's maximum stamina is equal to your maximum stamina.

The [[lookup @name]] selects an affinity for one of the following damage types when they are summoned: acid, cold, corruption, fire, lightning, or poison. This type determines the Portent's affinity immunity, free strikes, and the damage type of their abilities.
The [[lookup @name]]'s free strikes inflict [[op M strong]] [[/apply slowed save]]. While slowed this way, the target takes [[/damage 1d6]]{1d6 affinity damage} at the start of each of their turns.
If the [[lookup @name]] only targets one creature or object with a strike, they deal additional damage to the target equal to your Reason.
Whenever an adjacent creature deals damage to the [[lookup @name]], they take [[/damage 4]]{4 affinity damage}.
Once per turn, the [[lookup @name]] can take [[/damage 10]] to allow you or an ally within your Summoner's Range to gain 1 heroic resource. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

biography.value: The vibrant waters of Arcadia pour through a hole in reality and pool into a verdant cup of paradise. As the pond babbles, it causes the surrounding flora to grow and provides the fey places to hide.

description.value: You and each non-minion ally that enters one or more squares within 3 squares of the pond or starts their turn there has their speed increased by 2 until the end of their turn.
Each of your fey minions that ends their turn within 3 squares of the pond is hidden until the start of their next turn.
